name: Dethcube
description: With 'Assault Mode' and 'Vaporize' as default precepts, Dethcube acts exactly as advertised, as a badass cube of 'deth'. Comes loaded with Deth Machine Rifle weapon.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.description:
Carbon steel plates used to reinforce Grineer armor.

Location: Venus, Phobos, Ceres, Jupiter, Pluto, and Sedna.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: With 'Assault Mode' and 'Vaporize' as default precepts, Dethcube acts exactly as advertised, as a badass cube of 'deth'. Comes loaded with Deth Machine Rifle weapon.

components.name: Circuits
components.description:
Various electronic components.

Location: Venus, Ceres, and the Kuva Fortress

components.name: Control Module
components.description:
Autonomy processor for Robotics. A Corpus design.

Location: Europa, Neptune, and the Void

components.name: Nano Spores
components.description:
Fibrous technocyte tumour. Handle Infested tissue with caution.

Location: Saturn, Neptune, Eris, and Deimos

patchlogs.name: Echoes of the Zariman: Update 31.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Ordis Sentinel Skin having no idle animation when equipped on Dethcube or Dethcube Prime.

patchlogs.name: Update 31.5: Angels of the Zariman
patchlogs.changes: Added Laser animation to Dethcube Swift Deth Precept Mod.

patchlogs.name: Scarlet Spear: 27.3.14
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a harmless script error that would occur if you aborted a mission at the exact moment your Dethcube's Vaporize Precept fired.

patchlogs.name: Atlas Prime: Update 25.8.0 + 25.8.0.1
patchlogs.changes:
Embody the herculean strength of the mountain with Atlas Prime. This titanic warrior comes with the Tekko Prime, the Dethcube Prime Sentinel and more!
New Axi Relics for Atlas Prime, Tekko Prime, and Dethcube Prime now also drop in Rotation C of Galleon Disruption, Lua Disruption, and Jupiter Disruption.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Update 24.0
patchlogs.changes: In an effort to reduce the inventory duplication clutter that came with the individual Sentinel attack Precept Mods, Wyrm, Wyrm Prime, Carrier, Carrier Prime, Dethcube, Taxon, and the newest Oxylus now come with the “Assault Mode” Mod: “Sentinel will attack first visible enemy within an area” (*final stats available in game).

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.7.3 + 14.7.3.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Operation: Gate Crash exploit where Dethcube's Vaporize would continue to deal damage when you should be completely impotent.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.0.7 + 14.0.7.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with emblems on the Carabus Dethcube not being placed symmetrically on either side of it's body.

patchlogs.name: Update 13.1.0: Amprex
patchlogs.fixes: New Carabus Skin for the Dethcube Sentinel

patchlogs.name: Update 10.1.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fix for crash that would occur if Dethcube vaporizes opponent in the Conclaves.

patchlogs.name: Update 9.8
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed incorrect emblem decorations on Dethcube

patchlogs.name: Update 9.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed incorrect emblem decorations on Dethcube.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 9.1.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fix for Dethcube issues with attacks.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 8.1.6
patchlogs.fixes: Weekend Dethcube bundle deal is now over.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 8.1.5
patchlogs.fixes: Added a new Dethcube bundle to the Market! Pew pew pew!
